fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`GRVkYcbcrComponents` describes the component mapping applied during a Vulkan
YCbCr (Y′CBCR) sampler conversion. Each property (`R`, `G`, `B`, `A`) holds
a `VkComponentSwizzle` value that controls how the corresponding channel is
sampled from the source image.

Use this struct as part of <xref:SkiaSharp.GrVkYcbcrConversionInfo> when
creating a Vulkan backend surface that wraps an external YCbCr image.

## Examples

```csharp
var components = new GRVkYcbcrComponents
{
    R = (uint)VkComponentSwizzle.Identity,
    G = (uint)VkComponentSwizzle.Identity,
    B = (uint)VkComponentSwizzle.Identity,
    A = (uint)VkComponentSwizzle.Identity,
};
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Specifies the component swizzle mapping for a Vulkan YCbCr conversion.
Gets or sets the swizzle mapping for the alpha component.
fields.value: A <see cref="T:System.UInt32" /> representing the <c>VkComponentSwizzle</c> value for the alpha channel.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the swizzle mapping for the blue component.
fields.value: A <see cref="T:System.UInt32" /> representing the <c>VkComponentSwizzle</c> value for the blue channel.
